stories.title: USMNT player ratings: Balogun, Pulisic team-best p...
stories.summary: In the USMNT's World Cup-opening win, Folarin Balogun and Christian Pulisic share the spotlight as the team's best players.

stories.title: VAR review: What was the 'mistaken identity' check...
U.S. starts in style with largest WC win since 193...
stories.summary: Folarin Balogun scored twice and Gio Reyna struck a sensational goal late on as the U.S. beat Paraguay 4-1 to start the World Cup.

stories.title: Pulisic subbed off at halftime, 'hoping it's nothi...
stories.summary: United States winger Christian Pulisic was substituted at halftime of his team's World Cup opener against Paraguay on Friday, with the Americans leading 3-0 at the break.

stories.title: Misiorowski Ks 15 in complete-game, 1-hit gem
stories.summary: Jacob Misiorowski struck out a career-high 15 and pitched a complete-game one-hitter to lead the Brewers to a 6-0 win over the Phillies on Friday night.
